chunks.text: September IRIS Server Patching | IRIS Skip to main content Skip to primary navigation Skip to primary sidebar September IRIS Server Patching Microsoft will release their patches for the month on Tuesday, September 10th, 2024. Various IRIS Windows and

ay, September 10th, 2024. Various IRIS Windows and Linux servers will be patched and rebooted Tuesday or Wednesday. PRINT, WINTERM and WDS will automatically patch and reboot Wednesday, September 11th, at 3:00am. WINTERM may be unavailable until 10:0

, at 3:00am. WINTERM may be unavailable until 10:00am Wednesday, depending on additional software updates. Linux servers lists.eecs, iris2.eecs (for access to the network and roster databases), and login.eecs/login-mfa.eecs will be patched and reboot

gin.eecs/login-mfa.eecs will be patched and rebooted Wednesday night. DNS servers cronus and rhea may also be briefly unavailable while rebooting at approximately 8:00pm Tuesday. On Wednesday, September 11th, the departmental DHCP server is scheduled

er 11th, the departmental DHCP server is scheduled for downtime from 10pm to 10:30pm (actual downtime is expected to be shorter than scheduled). UPDATE [2024-09-12 | larsrohr ] This work has been completed. Resolved as of 2024-09-12 10:00am Primary S

leted. Resolved as of 2024-09-12 10:00am Primary Sidebar IRIS Service Status We have 0 Active Incidents, and 1 Scheduled Maintenance noted. IST Service Status Outages to campus services are listed at berkeley.statusdashboard.com .
